name: Cran-Raspberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Stirring occasionally, cook over medium heat until sugar dissolves and mixture begins to boil.
3. Stirring frequently, cook for 5 minutes or until slightly thickened.
4. Cool to room temperature.
5. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
6. Serve with meat, bread, or pound cake.
Yield: about 6 cups of relish.
